productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Minnie And Daisy Pink Kidswear
description: CompositionWhite round neck sleeveless t-shirt with pink colour gradation made of 100% cotton, aqua blue and pink piping around neckline and armholes, aqua blue ribbon bow next to collar and Minnie and Daisy graphic on the frontWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis white and pink Minnie Mouse and Daisy Duck tee from disney is perfect for your little princess. Minnie and Daisy will keep her company while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The sleeveless cotton tee will keep your little one comfortably dry. This top looks great when teamed up with denim shorts or skirts for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
